hero.subtext: Launch your own crypto card program in 90 days. Zelt offers Card-as-a-Service backed by USDC and USDT — KYC managed, API-first, LATAM-ready.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.subtitle: From application to first card issued — typically 90 days, including Visa certification.

steps.title: Apply & Integrate
steps.desc: Submit your company profile. Our compliance team runs KYB and onboards you in days — not months. API keys delivered instantly.

steps.title: Configure your program
steps.desc: Set spending limits, choose virtual or physical cards, enable Apple Pay / Google Pay. Full control via dashboard or API.

steps.title: Onboard your users
steps.desc: Use our KYC-as-a-Service (powered by Sumsub) or delegate to your own KYC provider. Issue cards in seconds via a single API call.

steps.title: Go live & scale
steps.desc: Cards accepted in 150+ countries. Stablecoin balance auto-converts at point of sale. Real-time webhooks, transaction monitoring, and chargeback management included.

items.title: Virtual & Physical Cards
items.desc: Issue Visa virtual cards instantly via API. Physical cards shipped globally with custom branding.

items.title: KYC/AML Managed
items.desc: Full compliance stack included — KYC, on-chain monitoring, and OFAC screening. Delegate or self-serve.

items.title: Apple Pay & Google Pay
items.desc: Your cardholders tap to pay worldwide from day one. No extra integration work needed.

items.title: LATAM-First Infrastructure
items.desc: PIX (BRL), SPEI (MXN), and ACH rails built-in. Full LATAM coverage out of the box.

items.title: Full API + Webhooks
items.desc: REST API for card issuance, auth controls, spend limits, and transaction streaming. iFrame widget for PCI scope reduction.

ramp.label: RAMP-AS-A-SERVICE
ramp.subtitle: Onramp and Offramp in both directions. USD, BRL, and MXN rails built-in. The same infrastructure that powers your card program.

api.label: DEVELOPER API
api.subtitle: REST API and SDKs that feel like fintech — not legacy financial middleware. Ship your card program with a few hundred lines of code.

pricing.label: PRICING
pricing.subtitle: No lock-in. Your clients stay yours. Scale up or down as your program grows.
pricing.collateral_note: All plans include Chainalysis AML monitoring, Fireblocks custody integration, and PCI-DSS compliance. Collateral: 3× daily spend volume.

demo.label: GET STARTED
demo.subtitle: Talk to our team. We'll walk you through the integration, licensing path, and get you a sandbox within 24h.
demo.note: No commitment. Sandbox access within 24 hours. NDA available.
demo.success_text: Our team will reach out within 24 hours with your sandbox access and a meeting link.

overview.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your card program.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your account security and active sessions.
security.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
security.sessionsDesc: Devices currently signed in to your account.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription and payment information.
billing.invoiceHistoryDesc: Download past invoices for your records.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage your team members and their roles.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose which events trigger email notifications.
notifications.webhookDesc: Receive real-time event payloads to your server.
